reference: Hi, I have been experiencing a continual decline in my white blood cell count for the past two years. My last count was two point four, and I have been having continuous infections as well. Today, I developed a few bruises, and there are several tiny red dots appearing on my legs and arms. What might this be?
text: Hi. I have been experiencing a continual decline in my white blood cell count for the past two years. My last count was 2.4, and I have been having continuous infections as well. Today I developed a few bruises, and there are several tiny red dots appearing on my legs and arms. What might this be?
